'''Beemon Laboratories''', also known simply as '''Beemon''', was a company active during the [[Jedi Civil War]], fought between the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During that [[Time/Legends|time]], Beemon produced high-end [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] implants. Their products included a type of implant known as the [[Beemon package]] and a prototype device known as an [[auxiliary brain]]. At the end of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], a period of unrest between the Republic and the reborn [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], the auxiliary [[Brain/Legends|brain]] was one of many items [[Raid on the King's Ransom|stolen]] from the Imperial [[Treasure ship|treasury starship]] [[King's Ransom (treasury ship)|''King's Ransom'']] by a [[Voidhound|smuggler]] and two [[Scoundrel/Legends|thieves]] named [[Vaz Traniff]] and [[Combo]].

==History==
Beemon Laboratories,<ref name="Beemon">While ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' only identified the producer of the package as "Beemon," ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' revealed the company's name to be "Beemon Laboratories."</ref> also known as Beemon, was a company that was formed<ref name="KotOR" /> by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="KotORDate" /> during the [[Jedi Civil War]], a conflict between the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. By that [[Time/Legends|time]], Beemon had produced the Beemon package, a cybernetic implant that could fetch prices up to 7,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on the open market.<ref name="KotOR" /> By the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], a period of unrest between the Republic and the reborn [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], Beemon Laborotories had produced a prototype device known as an auxiliary [[Brain/Legends|brain]]. Around the time that the Cold War escalated into the [[Galactic War]], the prototype was stored in one of the vaults of the Imperial [[Treasure ship|treasury starship]] [[King's Ransom (treasury ship)|''King's Ransom'']]. However, the brain was one of many valuable items looted from the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] when it was [[Raid on the King's Ransom|raided]] by a [[Voidhound|smuggler]] and two [[Scoundrel/Legends|thieves]] named [[Vaz Traniff]] and [[Combo]].<ref name="TOR" />

==Products==
During its existence, Beemon Laboratories<ref name="Beemon" /> produced high-quality technological devices<ref name="KotOR" /> such as the prototype [[auxiliary brain]]<ref name="TOR" /> and the [[Beemon package]], which sold for around 7,500 credits around the time of the Jedi Civil War. The Beemon package was a high-grade [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] implant that allowed [[Species/Legends|organic beings]] [[Cyborg/Legends|equipped]] with it to have greater resistance to pain and stress.<ref name="KotOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Beemon was first mentioned in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', a [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] produced by [[BioWare]]. It was mentioned in the entry for the Beemon package, which gave no information about Beemon beyond the fact that they created the implant.<ref name="KotOR" /> Beemon was given the name "Beemon Laboratories" in the description for the Beemon Laboratories prototype auxiliary brain in "Heist of the Millennium," a quest for the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] class in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', a MMORPG produced by BioWare in [[2011]].<ref name="TOR" />
